TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Atonan ga niya mki sku Hualien Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 863 buwan, 2,103 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 541 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 1,562 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal pqwasan biru'. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Atonan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Atonan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Atonan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Atonan hya' ga Hualien go. tay mkraya' na Atonan hya' ga Citekudan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ atonan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħualien keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiteku*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Atonan ga niya mki sku Hualien Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 863 buwan, 2,103 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 541 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 1,562 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal pqwasan biru'. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Atonan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Atonan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Atonan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Atonan hya' ga Hualien go. tay mkraya' na Atonan hya' ga Citekudan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ atonan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħualien keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na atonan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiteku*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
